member.name: T:MaintManager.MAUI.Controls.StateView
member.summary: Control reutilizable que encapsula los 4 estados obligatorios de toda vista con datos. Estados: Loading → Error → Empty → Success. El contenido de Success se define en el Content del control.

member.name: T:MaintManager.MAUI.Converters.InvertedBoolConverter
member.summary: Convierte bool → !bool. Uso: IsEnabled = NOT IsLoading.

member.name: T:MaintManager.MAUI.Converters.IsNotNullConverter
member.summary: Convierte any → bool. true si el valor no es null ni string vacío. Uso: IsVisible = campo != null.

member.name: T:MaintManager.MAUI.Converters.IsNullConverter
member.summary: Convierte any → bool. true si el valor es null o string vacío.

member.name: T:MaintManager.MAUI.Converters.IntToBoolConverter
member.summary: Compara un int con el parameter. Uso: IsChecked = SelectedTypeId == 1. ConverterParameter="1" → true si value == 1.

member.name: T:MaintManager.MAUI.Converters.StringEqualsConverter
member.summary: Compara un string con el parameter. Uso: IsChecked = OriginService == "Taller propio".

member.name: T:MaintManager.MAUI.Converters.BoolToColorConverter
member.summary: Devuelve TrueColor o FalseColor según el valor bool. Uso: TextColor = IsBelowMinimum ? Red : TextSecondary.

member.name: T:MaintManager.MAUI.Converters.AlertTypeToColorConverter
member.summary: Mapea el tipo de alerta a un color semántico para la UI.

member.name: T:MaintManager.MAUI.Converters.AlertTypeToLabelConverter
member.summary: Convierte el código de tipo de alerta a texto legible para el usuario final. Nunca muestra códigos técnicos al jefe ni a los mecánicos.

member.name: T:MaintManager.MAUI.Converters.StockStatusColorConverter
member.summary: Devuelve color rojo si IsBelowMinimum, verde si no. Uso: TextColor del stock total en la lista de inventario.

member.name: T:MaintManager.MAUI.Converters.DaysUntilExpiryColorConverter
member.summary: Rojo si ≤ 7 días, naranja si ≤ 30, verde si más.

member.name: M:MaintManager.MAUI.ViewModels.Inventory.InventoryListViewModel.OnSearchTextChanged(System.String)
member.summary: Executes the logic for when just changed.

member.remarks: This method is invoked right after the value of is changed.

member.name: T:MaintManager.MAUI.Resource
member.summary: Android Resource Designer class. Exposes the Android Resource designer assembly into the project Namespace.

member.name: T:CommunityToolkit.Mvvm.ComponentModel.__Internals.__KnownINotifyPropertyChangingArgs
member.summary: A helper type providing cached, reusable instances for all properties generated with .

member.name: F:CommunityToolkit.Mvvm.ComponentModel.__Internals.__KnownINotifyPropertyChangingArgs.Alerts
member.summary: The cached instance for all "Alerts" generated properties.

member.summary: The cached instance for all "IsAdmin" generated properties.
